retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election, then destroy provided no pending court action or court order (R.C. 3505.31) ; Electronic: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election, then destroy provided no pending court action or court order (R.C. 3505.31), Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
